title: refactor: align shared inline links in enter
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Updates `InlineLink` in `packages/ui` to the stronger vanilla inline-link treatment.
- Replaces hand-styled inline URL links in the Enter key dialog with `InlineLink`.
- Reuses `InlineLink` in the wallet footer, including the explanatory wallet text and Refund Policy link.

Validation:
- `biome check --write packages/ui/src/primitives/InlineLink.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/keys/api-key-dialog.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/pollen/pollen-balance.tsx`
- `tsc --noEmit -p enter.pollinations.ai/tsconfig.json`

gist.headline: A fresh coat of link paint
gist.blurb: We've polished up the inline links across the Enter dashboard and wallet footer. Everything is looking a little more cohesive and easier to click!
gist.summary: Updated the shared InlineLink component in the UI package and applied it to the API key dialog and wallet footer for consistent styling.
gist.impact: Users will notice cleaner, more consistent link styling when viewing their API keys or checking the wallet refund policy.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a designer, painting or connecting glowing chain links to represent UI link alignment.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) chain link symbol on a retro computer monitor. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
